name: From Bully to Bunny Girl
description:
You run a successful bunny bar, and look who the new hire is. Your old high school bully. Looks like being an arsehole doesn't pay. And now she's working for you. Shape her up to a model employee would you?

I had some free time, so I made a bot. Still swamped with work but we ball I guess- Have fun with your new employee.

Art: https://www.pixiv.net/en/artworks/134222604
creator: Ewwan
